name: Water
desc: Melted from ice fields. Feeds oxygen and food production.

name: Oxygen
desc: Breathable air. Electrolysed from water; colonists consume it.

name: Food
desc: Grown in hydroponics from water. Colonists consume it.

name: Power
desc: Electricity capacity. Generators supply it; buildings draw it.

name: Iron Ore
desc: Mined from confirmed iron deposits. Smelted into metal.

name: Copper Ore
desc: Mined from confirmed copper deposits. Used to make parts.

name: Metal
desc: Refined from iron ore. The main building material.

name: Parts
desc: Built from metal and copper. Needed for advanced buildings.

name: Xenite
desc: Rare crystal. Accumulate it to launch the beacon and win.
